title: Dungeons Dimensions: Nether
description: Adds terrain content from Minecraft Dungeons for The Nether
body:
# ![Dungeons Dimensions Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f58ba10ea3efc5c11e8395a798d493c486e1280f.png) A project to enhance Minecraft's Nether using content from Minecraft: Dungeons



Dungeons Dimensions: Nether adds new Blocks and Foliage, updates existing block models and textures, and adds new world generation, all based on how they appear in Minecraft: Dungeons. ## New Nether Fortresses! Dungeons Dimensions: Nether now updates the Nether Fortress to resemble it's Dungeons Appearance ![Fortress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sf8l9B73/images/08ff5807732cce17d1a779556cad1698ff9241ef.png) ## Compatibility This mod is compatible with Amplified Nether! ![Crimson Forest (Amplified)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sf8l9B73/images/019df5828a494d5ae7fee7a65b43dc07f4ac1cf2.png) ## Info modid: mcd_d_nether If using shaders: Highly recommend enabling LabPBR Emissives This project is not approved by or associated with Mojang Studios or Microsoft Other Dimensions Soon™ (This was meant to be a resource pack lol)
